pages.raw_text:
The third national apple show, to
be held in Spokane during the
week of November IA, will be with
out an equal in the history of the
country. Prizes and trophies to
the value of $4,000 will be award
ed and the field is open to the
whole world.


The trustees of the national ap-
pie show held meeting yesterday
afternoon and the indications go to
show that the Spokane exposition
will be the largest and most COM
plete of its kind ever held.


Dates for apple shows are as fol-
lows:


Spokane-November IA to 10, in
elusive: state arnfory, big top tent
and adjoining structures, estimated
cost, $4,000.


Chicago-November % to Deem
Der 4, inclusive; First Regiment ar
mory; estimated cost, $4,000.


Rem H. Rice, secretary of the Ma.
tional Apple Show, Incorporated,
will have charge of both exhibi.
tons.
